schema_notes: concept-level booleans grounded in the real Flask GitHub state for 7 PRs (pallets/flask). Verdicts mirror the actual merged/closed-unmerged outcome; contributor labels are derived from author_association and prior_merged_prs at the time of the PR.

ground_truth.accepted_label_alternatives_note: pr_5389 author Siecje has prior_merged_prs=4 and a first_contributed_at of 2014-11-21 (10+ year contribution history). The prompt's 'long history of merged work' wording is ambiguous between counting merged PRs and counting years; both 'external' and 'veteran' are defensible interpretations. Either label is accepted on this PR.

pr_5375.author: ghost
pr_5375.rejection_reason: ThiefMaster + davidism declined cosmetic README rewrite consistent with prior policy.

pr_5382.author: davidism
pr_5382.merge_reason: Maintainer self-merge after CI; targeted 3.0.x for 3.0.1 release.

pr_5384.author: ahmetelgun
pr_5384.rejection_reason: davidism declined redirecting official docs to a personal third-party fork.

pr_5389.author: Siecje
pr_5389.merge_reason: davidism approved BaseLoader typehint correction; targeted 3.0.2.

pr_5393.author: r04922101
pr_5393.merge_reason: Confirmed regression on Python <3.12 with regression test; merged for 3.0.2.

pr_5402.author: ByteJoseph
pr_5402.rejection_reason: davidism: README and docs already show the recommended way to run the dev server.

pr_5433.author: MagnusOxlund
pr_5433.rejection_reason: Branch carried 42 unrelated upstream commits across 13 files instead of a focused docstring fix; author closed it themselves.

deterministic_verdict_rule.definition: verdict must equal the real GitHub outcome of the PR — merge iff merged_at is non-null in meta.json, reject iff merged_at is null.
